name: Starter Minion / Companion Witch
summary: A minion-oriented Witch starter where summoned bodies absorb pressure and deal damage while the player learns enemy attacks. Beginner-friendly, but minion scaling and Spirit reservation need attention.
who_should_play: New players who want extra bodies between them and danger while learning.
Players who prefer commanding minions over precise aiming.
Players who can tolerate slightly more complex scaling (Spirit, minion stats).
review_notes: Published as research-backed Necromancer minion starter. Ascendancy from official GGG passive-tree export (Witch -> Necromancer). Skill/support ids from community PoB PoE2 extract (Raise Zombie, Minion Pact, Last Gasp, Frost Wall, Blink). Spirit reservation totals are not published as exact numbers — minions reserve Spirit and you must verify capacity in game. Not in-game tested.

source.notes: Authored from research cards 03-09; not a copied creator build.

source_links.label: Gem ids: Path of Building Community PoE2 (community data)

failure_modes: Minions die repeatedly if their survivability and your Spirit setup are neglected.
Minion scaling is patch-sensitive; a balance change can shift power noticeably.
Player can become too passive and forget personal defenses.

skills.name: Raise Zombie

supports.name: Last Gasp
supports.note: Helps minions survive longer between resummons.

skills.note: Your main army skill. Keep zombie count stable before chasing luxury damage supports.

skills.name: Frost Wall
skills.note: Blocks enemy paths while minions fight — cheap defensive utility that does not add Spirit reservation.

skills.name: Blink
skills.note: Short-range escape. Minions do not make you invincible — you still dodge.

passive_milestones.goal: Take minion offence and minion defence clusters near the Witch start.
Pick up more minion survival and personal life nodes.
Balance minion damage with your own resistances before pure damage.

notes: Raise Zombie and linked supports are Intelligence-weighted (100 Int at level 1 from community gem data).
Keep Intelligence above your highest gem requirement; the amulet often supplies the buffer.
Minions reserve Spirit. Exact reservation per zombie depends on gem level and is not in our community extract — enter your in-game total in the attribute checker.
Do not add persistent minions or aura supports until you know your Spirit capacity.
Gear that grants Spirit is part of your reservation budget; swapping it can desummon minions.

weapon.budget_compromise: Cheap sceptre with minion damage or Spirit is enough for campaign.
weapon.campaign_target: Any sceptre with minion damage or +levels
weapon.red_maps_target: Strong minion levels with Spirit for extra minions or supports
weapon.budget_note: Spirit or +minion levels beats raw spell damage for this build.

body_armour.base: Energy-shield or hybrid base that meets attribute requirements
body_armour.budget_compromise: Plain rare with life and one resistance.
body_armour.early_maps_target: Fill resistance gaps; Spirit is a bonus
body_armour.red_maps_target: High defensive rolls before luxury minion modifiers
body_armour.budget_note: Your own survivability matters; do not hide behind minions alone.

helmet.budget_note: Plain rare with life and resists is enough for campaign.

priority: minion or cast modifiers if affordable
gloves.early_maps_target: Minion damage if resistances are capped
gloves.red_maps_target: Minion damage + life with capped resists

boots.base: Any defensive base that meets attribute requirements
boots.budget_compromise: Movement speed is non-negotiable for safety.
boots.budget_note: Movement speed keeps you out of danger while minions fight.

belt.red_maps_target: High life and resistances before damage
belt.budget_note: Easy slot to patch resistance holes.

amulet.budget_compromise: Intelligence or Spirit to meet gem and reservation needs.
amulet.early_maps_target: Minion damage with Spirit or Int
amulet.budget_note: Can carry Spirit or Intelligence that keeps minions running.

priority: attributes if a requirement is tight

ring_2.budget_note: Pair with ring 1 to finish capping resistances.

gear_swap_warnings.message: If your amulet supplies Spirit or the Intelligence your minion gems need, swapping it without replacing that Spirit/Intelligence can desummon minions or disable a companion.
A weapon that grants Spirit is part of your reservation budget; swapping to a non-Spirit weapon may leave you unable to sustain all minions.

campaign_targets: Keep elemental resistances as high as the campaign allows for your level.
Keep your own life or energy shield current — do not hide behind minions alone.
Maintain enough minion life that you are not resummoning every pack.
early_maps_targets: Cap elemental resistances on your character.
Have movement speed on boots and Blink for repositioning.
Minion survivability stable under map monster damage.
defenses.recovery: Personal life/ES regeneration or flasks plus minion leech/regen where available.
defenses.movement_baseline: Movement speed on boots plus Blink for escapes.
defenses.chaos_resistance_note: Chaos resistance is a bonus during campaign, not a priority.
map_mods_to_avoid: Monsters deal extra damage / player takes increased damage (minions and you both suffer).
Less recovery — harder to sustain through mistakes.
Monsters have increased attack/cast speed before your defenses are capped.

death_diagnostic.first_fix: Add life/resists on chest, belt, rings

death_diagnostic.pattern: Minions die instantly, you have no damage
death_diagnostic.cause: Minion survivability or Spirit too low
death_diagnostic.first_fix: Add minion life supports or reduce reservation

death_diagnostic.cause: Lost Intelligence or Spirit from gear swap
death_diagnostic.first_fix: Restore Int/Spirit on amulet or weapon before swapping damage

filters.filter_recipe: Search: Rare sceptre, minion damage or +levels; add Spirit filter if you need reservation room.
Search: Rare boots with movement speed; add life and one resistance.
Search: Rare ring with any elemental resistance; life is optional at low budget.
Search: Second ring to patch the resistance gap your other gear left open.
Search: Amulet with Intelligence or Spirit so Raise Zombie stays active.
